name: InstalledDrivers
summary: The InstalledDrivers collector shows details about drivers installed on managed devices.

fields.name: displayname
fields.description: The display name for the driver.

fields.name: last_modified_date
fields.description: A date-time value indicating when the driver was last modified.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A short name that uniquely identifies the driver.

fields.name: servicetype
fields.description: The type of service provided to calling processes.

fields.name: startmode
fields.description: The driver start-up mode. Boot — the driver is started by the operating system loader. System — the driver is started by the operating system. Automatic — the driver starts automatically at system startup. Manual — the driver starts by the service control manager. The service control manager also allows to manually start the driver. Disabled — the driver can no longer be started.

fields.name: state
fields.description: The current state of the driver.

fields.name: path
fields.description: The fully qualified path to the driver file.

examples.title: Example: Show drivers which are disabled on devices.
